title: Los Angeles Chapter #65 (NADE) — Constitution and By-Laws
description: Combined Constitution and By-Laws of the Los Angeles Chapter (#65) of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE), a California chapter. Covers name and affiliation, purpose, membership (NADE membership only, no chapter dues), organization with officers President/President-Elect/Secretary/Treasurer plus the immediate Past President on the Executive Board, monthly meetings on the second Tuesday with proxy/electronic voting, nominations and elections at the January annual business meeting, standing committees (Membership, Communications, Fundraising, Education, Constitution and By-Laws), parliamentary authority, and constitutional amendment by two-thirds vote.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Los Angeles (California) Chapter
source.title: Constitution and By-Laws of the Los Angeles Chapter #65 of NADE

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This .md is the markitdown-normalized conversion of the sibling source file 'Cal-LA-Const-Bylaws.doc' in the same directory. The document is footer-stamped 'Updated 7/12/05', so temporal_coverage start/end are set to 2005. Conversion/source artifact: Article VII Section 9 of the committees section refers to maintaining the 'OKADE Constitution and By-laws' (an Oklahoma-chapter reference apparently carried over when this LA document was adapted from a template); it does not change that the document otherwise governs the Los Angeles chapter. The source URL is the NADE organization site, not a deep link.
